items.title: A Corporate Film | Apache Egypt
description: A corporate impact film highlighting Apache’s long-term presence in Egypt since 1996, including major investment and leadership in the country’s oil and gas sector.

The video spotlights Apache’s “Give Where We Live” commitment, supporting Egypt Vision 2030 through education, community development, and social initiatives, with a strong focus on girls’ education through the Springboard program and ongoing support for schools in rural and operational areas.
It also features broader community support, from healthcare initiatives and blood donation campaigns to orphanage support, sanitation, and scholarships for Egyptian students.

items.title: A Corporate Story | Engazat
description: A corporate documentary created for Engazat, built to present the company story through a documentary-style lens.
The film focuses on real environments, authentic moments, and a clear narrative structure that supports brand storytelling in a credible, human way.
Designed as a premium, long-form corporate asset for presentations, digital platforms, and stakeholder communications.

items.title: ILO x UE Documentary Film
description: We produce short documentary films like this for development programs and FMCG partners, combining interviews with real on-ground footage to communicate impact clearly and credibly.

This 3-minute film for the ILO features Upper Egypt for Food Products (UE), showcasing the farm-to-factory journey through interviews and visuals from the farms and the facilities where produce is washed, processed, and packaged.
Delivered as a concise storytelling piece for stakeholder communications, reporting, and multi-platform distribution.
